captions.p3_hybrid:
This is a close-up shot of a bowl of savory noodles submerged in a rich brown broth. The dish features light-colored noodles mixed with yellow-green vegetables, and a metal spoon rests partially in the food.

Search keywords: Noodle soup, Asian food, savory noodles, broth, close-up food, vermicelli, bowl food
captions.p3_hybrid_food_guard:
Caption: A close-up shot shows a bowl of savory broth topped with light-colored sprouts and green garnishes. The food is being served with a spoon.

Visual details: A dark bowl contains a brownish-orange broth. The bowl is filled with light, thin, pale strands (likely sprouts) and some bright green garnishes. A metal spoon is visible in the foreground, scooping up some of the ingredients.

Context cues: The photo was taken in March 2018. The image was captured using an Apple iPhone SE.

Search keywords: sprouts, vegetable soup, broth, Asian food, mung bean sprouts, bowl food, savory soup, thin garnish, food photography, cooked vegetables, light noodles.

captions.p3_hybrid:
This is a close-up photograph of a bowl of light-colored noodles submerged in a light broth. The dish is topped with a large, smooth white item and a piece of dark brown meat resting among the noodles.

**Search keywords:** Noodles, soup, food photography, egg, meat, broth, Asian cuisine, bowl food, close-up.
captions.p3_hybrid_food_guard:
Caption: A close-up shot features a bowl of light-colored noodles topped with a thick white meat slice and green vegetables, served in a shallow, gray bowl.
Visual details: The image displays a serving of light, thin noodles submerged in a light broth or sauce within a wide, gray bowl. On top of the noodles are several ingredients, including a large, thick, white, smooth slice of meat, and some bright green leafy vegetables. The composition is a tight, overhead view focusing primarily on the food.
Context cues: The photograph was taken indoors and was captured in late November 2016.
Search keywords: noodles, white meat topping, green vegetables, bowl food, Asian cuisine, savory noodles, broth, dinner, food photography, dish.
